name: pyramid-sort
description: Sort your imports, attributes, types, objects & CSS by line length — short lines on top, long lines on the bottom. Clean pyramid-shaped code.

pyramidSort.extensions.description: File extensions (e.g. .vue, .svelte, .css) the extension runs on for imports/attributes/types/objects and stylesheets.

pyramidSort.showDiagnostics.description: Master switch for Problems-tab diagnostics. Turn off to silence every category at once; otherwise each category is controlled by its own `pyramidSort.diagnostics.*` toggle.

pyramidSort.diagnostics.imports.description: Report import-order problems in the Problems tab.

pyramidSort.diagnostics.attributes.description: Report JSX/HTML attribute-order problems in the Problems tab.

pyramidSort.diagnostics.types.description: Report type/interface/enum-member order problems in the Problems tab.

pyramidSort.diagnostics.objects.description: Report object-literal property-order problems in the Problems tab.

pyramidSort.diagnostics.css.description: Report CSS/SCSS declaration-order problems in the Problems tab.

pyramidSort.sortImportsOnSave.description: Sort imports when the file is saved.

pyramidSort.imports.direction.description: Sort direction for imports by line length. "auto" uses the line above the import block vs median import line length.

pyramidSort.imports.consolidateMultiline.description: Collapse multi-line imports into single-line imports grouped to fit within maxLineWidth.

pyramidSort.imports.maxLineWidth.description: Max characters per import line when consolidating multi-line imports. Use 0 for automatic width from Prettier config files (e.g. .prettierrc, package.json "prettier"), then the Prettier extension's printWidth, then editor.rulers; set a positive number to override.

pyramidSort.imports.groupByEmptyRows.description: Treat blank lines as group boundaries when sorting imports.

pyramidSort.imports.groupExternalLocal.description: Auto-group imports into external (npm) vs local (relative / alias) with a blank line between them. Turn off for pure length sort in one block.

pyramidSort.sortAttributesOnSave.description: Sort JSX/HTML attributes when the file is saved.

pyramidSort.attributes.direction.description: Sort direction for JSX/HTML attributes by line length. "auto" compares the opening tag line to attribute lines.

pyramidSort.attributes.groupByEmptyRows.description: Treat blank lines as group boundaries when sorting JSX/HTML attributes.

pyramidSort.types.direction.description: Sort direction for type/interface/enum members. "auto" compares the declaration line to body lines.

pyramidSort.types.groupByEmptyRows.description: Treat blank lines as group boundaries inside type/interface/enum blocks.

pyramidSort.sortObjectsOnSave.description: Sort object literal properties on save.

pyramidSort.objects.direction.description: Sort direction for object literal properties. "auto" compares the line with `{` to body lines.

pyramidSort.objects.groupByEmptyRows.description: Treat blank lines as group boundaries inside object literals.

pyramidSort.objects.sortNestedObjects.description: Also sort object literals in function calls and nested `key: { }`; uses block-aware sorting.

pyramidSort.sortCssOnSave.description: Sort CSS/SCSS declarations inside rule blocks on save.

pyramidSort.css.direction.description: Sort direction for CSS declarations. "auto" compares the selector line to declaration lines.

pyramidSort.css.groupByEmptyRows.description: Treat blank lines as group boundaries inside CSS rule blocks.

pyramidSort.forceSort.groupByEmptyRows.description: Treat blank lines as group boundaries for Force Sort commands.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:cli
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
